description: policy to protect this plugin itself from being attacked, this file cannot be changed by admin UI.  This is useful when broader scoped grant policy, e.g. [grant all exec command access] is set in config.json.  It's hard to forsee all attacks, recommend to start the admin UI only when needed, and set OS level read access only to the policy files.

policies.desc: Deny any command related to admin UI's config URL
Deny edit openclaw.json to remove fg-tool-access-control plugin
